uplink.description: Sensor report: water temperature, cumulative consumption, battery
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature=21, consumption=12345, batterylevel=87) then remapping to canonical keys. consumption is litres -> metering.water.total as-is; batterylevel is a percentage -> batteryPercent extra. bytes [6,17,48,57] = 0x06 0x11 0x3039 (12345).
Upstream decodes 0x06 0x11 0xEA60 to consumption=60000; remapped to metering.water.total (litres, as-is).

uplink.description: Flow-stop event with per-event consumption (no cumulative total)
uplink._note: Upstream 0x07 state 1 yields flow=0, conumption_time=600 (0x0258), conumption_liter=42; these are per-event values, surfaced as camelCase extras (not metering.water.total, which is the lifetime totaliser).
